summary: W913 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W912's two abbrev-typed fixed-target uniqueness obligations with raw objectwise-localization uniqueness quantifier fields. This preserves the W899-W912 endpoint-homology-free closed-map route and still routes through W912 into the stable ExactAt construction. Product success remains false because the route fields are not yet instantiated and the original four-task completion witness and review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W913 exposes the fixed-target uniqueness obligations as quantifier fields, but the remaining W913 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W913 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W913 fields include the boundary fields, relation fields, target surjectivity and compactness fields, selected-difference pi1/pi2/pi3 closed-map diagram component fields, the raw mapped explicit cokernel IsClosedMap field, strict preimage object and map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, the raw fixed-target uniqueness quantifier fields, source pretriangulated/triangulated/triangle-completion fields, endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/ExactAt-to-epi facts, and bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-nine W913 closed-map fixed-target-uniqueness-fields localized-right-adjoint-fields explicit inputs.

Choose whether the next smallest contract-closing increment should expose source-image normalization, selected-difference closed-map component fields, strict-preimage coherence consolidation, branch selection, or another currently supported concrete provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
